growth_records.lvlwhy: the source paper (often a review/modeling reuse) states no strain
growth_records.cite: Dethlefsen et al. Differences in codon bias cannot explain differences in translational power among microbes. BMC Bioinformatics (2005). DOI:10.1186/1471-2105-6-3. [PMC546186]
growth_records.notes: Table 1. Actual temp 37C so no temperature correction (no factor): col3 mu = 0.10 hr-1 = actual measured; td=ln2/0.10=6.93 h. rrn copy#=2. Cited from ref [37]; secondary. No uptake/secretion/medium.
